ham.subject: VPN Maintenance Notice – 15 June 2026
ham.body:
Dear Colleagues,

This is a reminder that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on 15th June 2026 from 02:00 to 04:00 UTC. During this window, VPN connectivity will be unavailable.

All employees will be able to access the VPN again after 04:00 UTC. Please plan accordingly and, if needed, use the internal proxy service during the downtime.

If you experience any issues post-maintenance, please contact the IT Help Desk at helpdesk@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent Payroll Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

We have detected an issue with your payroll account. To ensure uninterrupted processing of your salary, please verify your banking details immediately. Failure to comply within 24 hours may result in a temporary hold on your next paycheck.
